476 N0410G_DRTC_DAY_NUM N0410G_DRTC_DAY_NUM N0410G Medications Received: Diuretic Number Days CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the number of days that the resident received a diurectic in the past seven days or since admission/reentry if less than seven days. 0 Minimum
